docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LUPPINO, CRISPINA AS TO DEFENDANT MOTRONI, PAULA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-19-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF SEP-01-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOTRONI, PAULA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LUPPINO, CRISPINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUPPINO, CRISPINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTRONI, PAULA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MOTRONI, PAULA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LUPPINO, CRISPINA $1,713.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,728.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MOTRONI, PAULA
